# Telemetry selectors report (1d)
# args: {__name__=~"e2etelemetry:cycle_a:sum|e2etelemetry:self_ref:sum|e2etelemetry:regex_inner:sum|e2etelemetry:no_metrics:gauge|e2etelemetry:counter_mixed:sum|e2etelemetry:process_cpu_seconds_total:max|e2etelemetry:chained_unless:max|e2etelemetry:dead_lhs_and:test"}
# Results depend on the queried Prometheus instance and may differ elsewhere.
selectors:
  - selector: '{__name__=~"e2etelemetry:cycle_a:sum|e2etelemetry:self_ref:sum|e2etelemetry:regex_inner:sum|e2etelemetry:no_metrics:gauge|e2etelemetry:counter_mixed:sum|e2etelemetry:process_cpu_seconds_total:max|e2etelemetry:chained_unless:max|e2etelemetry:dead_lhs_and:test"}'
    metrics:
      - name: e2etelemetry:chained_unless:max
        peak_series: N
        value_range: V
        recording_rule:
          file: RULEFILE
          expr: |-
            max(etcd_server_has_leader{job="etcd"}) unless e2e_nonexistent_unless_x
            unless
            e2e_nonexistent_unless_y
          tree: |-
            ├── etcd_server_has_leader{job="etcd"}
            │     <job: etcd> <value_range: V> <peak_series: N>
            ├── e2e_nonexistent_unless_x
            │     <value_range: V> <peak_series: N>
            └── e2e_nonexistent_unless_y
                  <value_range: V> <peak_series: N>
      - name: e2etelemetry:counter_mixed:sum
        peak_series: N
        value_range: V
        recording_rule:
          file: RULEFILE
          expr: sum(rate(process_cpu_seconds_total{job="etcd"}[5m])) + max(process_cpu_seconds_total{job="etcd"})
          tree: |-
            └── process_cpu_seconds_total{job="etcd"}
                  <job: etcd> <value_range: V> <peak_series: N>
      - name: e2etelemetry:cycle_a:sum
        peak_series: N
        value_range: V
        recording_rule:
          file: RULEFILE
          expr: sum(e2etelemetry:cycle_b:max) + etcd_server_has_leader{job="etcd"}
          tree: |-
            ├── e2etelemetry:cycle_b:max
            │     <expr: max(e2etelemetry:cycle_a:sum)>
            │     <value_range: V> <peak_series: N> <file: RULEFILE>
            │   └── e2etelemetry:cycle_a:sum
            │         <expr: sum(e2etelemetry:cycle_b:max) + etcd_server_has_leader{job="etcd"}>
            │         <peak_series: N> <file: RULEFILE>
            └── etcd_server_has_leader{job="etcd"}
                  <job: etcd> <value_range: V> <peak_series: N>
      - name: e2etelemetry:dead_lhs_and:test
        peak_series: N
        value_range: V
        recording_rule:
          file: RULEFILE
          expr: e2e_nonexistent_and_lhs and max(etcd_server_has_leader{job="etcd"})
          tree: |-
            ├── e2e_nonexistent_and_lhs
            │     <value_range: V> <peak_series: N>
            └── etcd_server_has_leader{job="etcd"}
                  <job: etcd> <value_range: V> <peak_series: N>
      - name: e2etelemetry:no_metrics:gauge
        peak_series: N
        value_range: V
        recording_rule:
          file: RULEFILE
          expr: hour() + day_of_week()
      - name: e2etelemetry:process_cpu_seconds_total:max
        peak_series: N
        value_range: V
        recording_rule:
          file: RULEFILE
          expr: max(process_cpu_seconds_total{job="etcd"})
          tree: |-
            └── process_cpu_seconds_total{job="etcd"}
                  <job: etcd> <value_range: V> <peak_series: N>
      - name: e2etelemetry:regex_inner:sum
        peak_series: N
        value_range: V
        recording_rule:
          file: RULEFILE
          expr: sum({__name__=~"etcd_server_has_leader|etcd_disk_wal_fsync_duration_seconds_count",job="etcd"})
          tree: |-
            └── {__name__=~"etcd_server_has_leader|etcd_disk_wal_fsync_duration_seconds_count",job="etcd"}
                  <job: etcd> <value_range: V> <peak_series: N>
      - name: e2etelemetry:self_ref:sum
        peak_series: N
        value_range: V
        recording_rule:
          file: RULEFILE
          expr: sum(e2etelemetry:self_ref:sum) + etcd_server_has_leader{job="etcd"}
          tree: |-
            ├── e2etelemetry:self_ref:sum
            │     <expr: sum(e2etelemetry:self_ref:sum) + etcd_server_has_leader{job="etcd"}>
            │     <value_range: V> <peak_series: N> <file: RULEFILE>
            └── etcd_server_has_leader{job="etcd"}
                  <job: etcd> <value_range: V> <peak_series: N>
    failing_checks:
      count: 21
      messages:
        - metric "e2etelemetry:cycle_a:sum" has 0 timeseries, source metrics may not exist or rule dependencies are not met
        - metric "e2etelemetry:dead_lhs_and:test" has 0 timeseries, source metrics may not exist or rule dependencies are not met
        - metric "e2etelemetry:self_ref:sum" has 0 timeseries, source metrics may not exist or rule dependencies are not met
        - recording rule "e2etelemetry:chained_unless:max" is defined in CMO, it should probably live in the owning component operator
        - recording rule "e2etelemetry:counter_mixed:sum" is defined in CMO, it should probably live in the owning component operator
        - recording rule "e2etelemetry:cycle_a:sum" is defined in CMO, it should probably live in the owning component operator
        - recording rule "e2etelemetry:dead_lhs_and:test" is defined in CMO, it should probably live in the owning component operator
        - recording rule "e2etelemetry:no_metrics:gauge" is defined in CMO, it should probably live in the owning component operator
        - recording rule "e2etelemetry:process_cpu_seconds_total:max" is defined in CMO, it should probably live in the owning component operator
        - recording rule "e2etelemetry:regex_inner:sum" is defined in CMO, it should probably live in the owning component operator
        - recording rule "e2etelemetry:self_ref:sum" is defined in CMO, it should probably live in the owning component operator
        - recording rule "e2etelemetry:counter_mixed:sum" uses counter "process_cpu_seconds_total" without rate()/increase(), raw counter values reset on restart and grow unbounded, making them meaningless as-is
        - recording rule "e2etelemetry:process_cpu_seconds_total:max" uses counter "process_cpu_seconds_total" without rate()/increase(), raw counter values reset on restart and grow unbounded, making them meaningless as-is
        - recording rule "e2etelemetry:cycle_a:sum" depends on "e2etelemetry:cycle_b:max" which has 0 series, ensure it is exercised within the observation window
        - recording rule "e2etelemetry:cycle_a:sum" depends on "e2etelemetry:cycle_a:sum" which has 0 series, ensure it is exercised within the observation window
        - recording rule "e2etelemetry:dead_lhs_and:test" depends on "e2e_nonexistent_and_lhs" which has 0 series, ensure it is exercised within the observation window
        - recording rule "e2etelemetry:self_ref:sum" depends on "e2etelemetry:self_ref:sum" which has 0 series, ensure it is exercised within the observation window
        - recording rule "e2etelemetry:chained_unless:max" uses the same source metrics as alert "etcdNoLeader", ALERTS is already forwarded to telemetry so this metric may be redundant
        - recording rule "e2etelemetry:cycle_a:sum" uses the same source metrics as alert "etcdNoLeader", ALERTS is already forwarded to telemetry so this metric may be redundant
        - recording rule "e2etelemetry:self_ref:sum" uses the same source metrics as alert "etcdNoLeader", ALERTS is already forwarded to telemetry so this metric may be redundant
        - matcher __name__=~"e2etelemetry:cycle_a:sum|e2etelemetry:self_ref:sum|e2etelemetry:regex_inner:sum|e2etelemetry:no_metrics:gauge|e2etelemetry:counter_mixed:sum|e2etelemetry:process_cpu_seconds_total:max|e2etelemetry:chained_unless:max|e2etelemetry:dead_lhs_and:test" alternation is unsorted, consider using __name__=~"e2etelemetry:chained_unless:max|e2etelemetry:counter_mixed:sum|e2etelemetry:cycle_a:sum|e2etelemetry:dead_lhs_and:test|e2etelemetry:no_metrics:gauge|e2etelemetry:process_cpu_seconds_total:max|e2etelemetry:regex_inner:sum|e2etelemetry:self_ref:sum"
